queries.question: Which financial institution has the best total liabilities and what year and decade was it founded?
queries.sql:
SELECT Name, Founding_Year, Founding_Decade
FROM Financial_Institutions
ORDER BY Total_Liabilities
LIMIT 1;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/banking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?founding_year ?founding_decade WHERE {
  ?financial_institutions a :Financial_Institutions .
  ?financial_institutions p:name ?name .
  ?financial_institutions p:Founding_Year ?founding_year .
  ?financial_institutions p:Founding_Decade ?founding_decade .
  ?financial_institutions p:Total_Liabilities ?total_liabilities_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?total_liabilities_o)
LIMIT 1
